selection.rule: Among adapters passing all three Tier-1 hard-gate cells, select the smallest absolute deviation of mean authorship AUC from 0.5; break ties by lower repeated-start rate.

promotion_gate.confirm: Advance to bounded M2 objective experiments and permit an evidence-gated 14B comparison.
promotion_gate.reject: Do not scale this recipe; diagnose the aggregate failing gates before further spend.
promotion_gate.inconclusive: Treat as non-confirmation and run no scale-up until a preregistered remedy exists.
